reasoning: Search results up to October 26, 2025 consistently demonstrate that Tesla has not released an unsupervised Full Self-Driving product that meets the resolution criteria. The July 2025 rollout in Austin used safety drivers and was invite-only, failing both the 'unsupervised' and 'broadly accessible' tests. The most recent major update, FSD v14, which started rolling out in October 2025, still maintains driver monitoring ('nags'). Several articles from September and October explicitly note that Elon Musk toned down expectations and confirmed that 'FSD Unsupervised' would not be included in the v14 rollout. With only five days remaining until the October 31 deadline and explicit confirmation of delays to at least 'the end of the year', the probability of all criteria being met is extremely low.
